spec_match.rationale: The demo now uses current text-fit: shrink for multi-locale text growth in fixed circular badges and CTA buttons; DevTools MCP verification is still blocked in this session.

interactive.rationale: The dynamic fit-mode toggle still updates both CTA buttons and circular badge layouts, but the required chrome-devtools-mcp interaction pass was unavailable.

blurb_alignment.rationale: Aligned perfectly with the parent description, illustrating button and badge scaling under 12 languages.

edge_cases.rationale: The multi-lingual data is an excellent stress test of length discrepancies, comparing English against Spanish, Finnish, German, and double-byte Asian characters.

references.rationale: The parent index contains the required reference, but there are no direct reference links listed in the concept file.

design_system.rationale: Follows design conventions cleanly, incorporating correct borders, typography, and colors.

openQuestions.title: Add direct spec / ChromeStatus reference link to concept page
openQuestions.detail: To make this localization concept fully self-contained, we should add a direct references section with links to ChromeStatus and the W3C CSS Text Level 4 draft.

summary: Static repair updated the localization demo from obsolete text-fit: contain syntax to current text-fit: shrink syntax. Browser verification remains blocked until chrome-devtools-mcp is available.
